falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by more than 15% from the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish breakout, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average by at least 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, directly opposing the current HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume declines by 40% or more from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would refute the blowoff score's implication of high volatility, invalidating the pattern similarity and UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
